look.text: The same closet, now with corners and a floor that recedes. You could believe a coat lives in there instead of merely being implied by one.
A rendered couch, sitting back where the perspective says it should. You shrink a little as you approach it — the depth band, doing its quiet job.

use.text: You test the cushions of the rendered couch. Schematically, they are perfect. Spiritually, you miss the hand-drawn ones.

exits.name: the door
exits.look: Through the rendered door — and straight into the hand-drawn version of the same room. Mind the dimensional seam.
